releases.summary: Install once on the printing computer, then the MSCQR Connector starts automatically in the background.
notes: Use the Mac package on the Mac that is connected to the printer.
Use the Windows package on the Windows PC that is connected to the printer.
After installation, open Printer Setup in MSCQR and confirm the printer shows as ready.

macos.label: macOS installer
notes: Double-click the pkg file to install it on the Mac that will print.
The connector registers a LaunchAgent and starts automatically at sign-in.

windows.label: Windows package
notes: Extract the ZIP package on the Windows computer that will print.
Run Install Connector.cmd once to install and auto-start the connector.
